title: alysicarpus glumaceus subsp. glumaceus
intro: Alysicarpus glumaceus subsp. glumaceus is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family, commonly known as the pea family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Alysicarpus glumaceus subsp. glumaceus include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared as an infusion or decoction, and can also be used in herbal preparations such as capsules or tinctures, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies.
